sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4068" key="a(lhgo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁληγός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n4068.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">carrying salt</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.685e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
